content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a simple introduction that includes your name, favorite hobby, and the reason you enjoy it—all separated by " | " for clarity. You will practice using f-strings to format your output neatly.

You should format your output as follows:
content.inputFormat: Optional integer T. If a line containing an integer is provided, the program prints the introduction T times, each on a separate line. If no input is given or the integer is ≤ 0, the introduction is printed exactly once.
content.outputFormat: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity. (Repeated T times if T is given, each on its own line.)

sampleTestCases.output: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
sampleTestCases.explanation: No input is given, so the program prints the introduction once.

sampleTestCases.output: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.\nName: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.\nName: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
sampleTestCases.explanation: The integer 3 means the line must be printed three times, each on a new line.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: single repetition
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: multiple repetitions
hidden.expectedOutput:
Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: non‑numeric input
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

solution.approach: Read the whole input. If the first token can be parsed as an integer T and T > 0, loop T times printing the fixed introduction line. Otherwise, print the line once. The problem requires no computation beyond handling the optional repetition, so the algorithm is O(T) time and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – one constant‑time print per required repetition.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few scalar variables are used.
